title: Smiling in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Smiling in Rebuild             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 13, 2010 12:05 am I sense a trend with smiling or lackthereof in Rebuild: 1.0: ~The Gendo & Rei smile while talking scene. ~Shinji wonders why Gendo smiles around Rei, not him. ~Rei and Shinji smile scene. 2.0: ~Rei and Shinji smiling somewhat more often compared to this point in original series. ~Asuka comments on smiling before Bardiel. ~Shinji and Misato's talk after the ordeal with Asuka: Rei wanting Gendo and Shinji to smile together, then Shinji says how he can't smile with anybody anymore. Could this become a theme of sorts in the film series?

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Wed Jan 13, 2010 12:16 am Hm...maybe they're leaning to making the ending more happy in the new conclusion?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Jan 13, 2010 12:22 am I hope the new conclusion is happy in some way with the cast still alive and not dead.

[]:             Quote Post by cojax8 » Wed Jan 13, 2010 1:28 am Perhaps, that’s probably the easiest way of showing that the characters are in a more happy state with the time constraints. But then again Anno could simply be screwing us into a false sense of security.

[]: Re: Smiling~ ^_^ (SPOILERS!)             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 13, 2010 5:31 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Could this become a theme of sorts in the flim series?

[]: Re: Smiling~ ^_^ (SPOILERS!)             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Jan 13, 2010 1:29 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ~Shinji and Misato's talk after the ordeal with Asuka: Rei wanting Gendo and Shinji to smile together, then Shinji says how he can't smile with anybody anymore.

[]: Re: Smiling~ ^_^ (SPOILERS!)             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 13, 2010 2:32 pm Axell wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: ~Shinji and Misato's talk after the ordeal with Asuka: Rei wanting Gendo and Shinji to smile together, then Shinji says how he can't smile with anybody anymore.

[]: Re: Smiling~ ^_^ (SPOILERS!)             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jan 13, 2010 3:47 pm Axell wrote: This didn't happen in NGE, Shinji walking out saying he has no one to smile with is one of the most powerful moments in the movie, and felt a lot better than "screw this I'm out" which is what the corresponding scene in 19 feels like now.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Jan 13, 2010 5:20 pm Watch him walking to school again and tell me he's not happy. Rebuild Shinji =/= NGE Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by itrytofight » Wed Jan 13, 2010 9:09 pm I think the smiling motif has its place in one of the movie posters of 2.0. You know, the poster where everyone's on the stair case in some ruined building smiling at the viewer (even Shinji manages a small smile if you look closely enough) except for two people: Mari and Rei. Hmmmm... wonder if their's a connection between them (maybe the clones of the same person maybe...)? Anyways, if the smiling motif is really being used by Anno, I'm liking how he's using it on the poster for forsahdowing!

[]:             Quote Post by firegirl26 » Wed Jan 13, 2010 9:10 pm Eva 04 wrote: I hope the new conclusion is happy in some way with the cast still alive and not dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jan 13, 2010 9:25 pm firegirl26 wrote: Eva 04 wrote: I hope the new conclusion is happy in some way with the cast still alive and not dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Jan 13, 2010 11:23 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: firegirl26 wrote: Eva 04 wrote: I hope the new conclusion is happy in some way with the cast still alive and not dead.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Thu Jan 14, 2010 6:36 pm Eva 04 wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: This ISN'T NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by itrytofight » Thu Jan 14, 2010 8:20 pm EVA X wrote: Eva 04 wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: This ISN'T NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu Jan 14, 2010 9:13 pm Did Rei and Shinji smile in the original series too?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jan 14, 2010 9:16 pm chaosakita wrote: Did Rei and Shinji smile in the original series too?

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Fri Jan 15, 2010 1:01 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Yes, episode 6 after Shinji goes into Rei's entry plug.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jan 15, 2010 1:59 am chaosakita wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Yes, episode 6 after Shinji goes into Rei's entry plug.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 15, 2010 9:00 am I really, honestly hope that the smiling is used as a false security blanket and is actually a red heron leading us on to believe Rebuild will be happy. All this time it's been HAPPY, HAPPY, SAD, HAPPY~! Whereas NGE was SAD, SAD, HAPPY, SAD~! Will all this happiness around it'll be that much more bitter sweet when it gets the sad ending it deserves.
